title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal language model optimized for local deployment on consumer laptops with 16GB+ VRAM. The model supports agentic workflows and integrates with tools like LiteRT-LM, Ollama, and Hermes for local, private AI inference.
